options.content:
# AI-Assisted Development Detection

This dashboard analyzes code patterns to identify pull requests that may have used AI coding assistants.

## Detection Methods

### Explicit Signals (HIGH confidence, max 50 points)
- **Git trailers:** `Co-Authored-By: Claude`, `Co-Authored-By: GitHub Copilot`
- **PR body markers:** `Generated with [Claude Code]`, `[Cursor]`, `[Copilot]`
- **Email domains:** `@anthropic.com`, `@copilot-generated`

### Behavioral Signals (max 50 points combined)
| Signal | Max Score | Detection Method |
|--------|-----------|------------------|
| Rapid Commits | 30 | Avg time between commits < 5 min |
| PR Size | 20 | Additions > 500 lines per PR |
| Lines/Minute | 25 | > 50 lines/min production rate |
| Duplication | 15 | Code pattern analysis |
| Generic Messages | 10 | Vague commit message detection |

### Confidence Score = Explicit Score + Behavioral Scores (0-100)

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) as explicit_detections FROM ai_usage_signals WHERE explicit_tool_detected = true
SELECT AVG(ai_confidence_score) as avg_confidence FROM ai_usage_signals WHERE ai_confidence_score > 0
SELECT COUNT(*) as total_prs FROM ai_usage_signals
SELECT COUNT(*) as high_confidence FROM ai_usage_signals WHERE ai_confidence_score >= 70
SELECT COUNT(*) as medium_confidence FROM ai_usage_signals WHERE ai_confidence_score >= 40 AND ai_confidence_score < 70

SELECT s.explicit_tools as ai_tool, pr.title as pr_title, pr.author_name, s.explicit_signal_score, s.ai_confidence_score as total_score, DATE(s.detected_at) as detected_date FROM ai_usage_signals s LEFT JOIN pull_requests pr ON pr.id = s.pull_request_id WHERE s.explicit_tool_detected = true ORDER BY s.detected_at DESC LIMIT 25

panels.title: PRs with Explicit AI Tool Markers

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(detected_tool, ''), 'unknown') as tool, COUNT(*) as count FROM ai_usage_signals WHERE ai_confidence_score >= 40 GROUP BY detected_tool ORDER BY count DESC

panels.title: AI Tools Detected (Claude, Copilot, Cursor, etc.)

targets.rawSql: SELECT s.id, pr.title as pr_title, pr.author_name, s.detected_tool, s.explicit_tool_detected as explicit, s.explicit_signal_score, s.rapid_commit_score, s.pr_size_score, s.lines_per_minute_score, s.ai_confidence_score, s.velocity_multiplier, DATE(s.detected_at) as detected_date FROM ai_usage_signals s LEFT JOIN pull_requests pr ON pr.id = s.pull_request_id ORDER BY s.ai_confidence_score DESC LIMIT 50

panels.title: All PRs by AI Confidence Score (with signal breakdown)

options.content:
## AI Impact Analysis

**Methodology:** Compare 90-day baseline period (before AI adoption) with 30-day current period (after adoption).

**Change Formula:** `((current - baseline) / baseline) × 100` — Sign inverted for time metrics (faster = positive)

targets.rawSql: SELECT pr_throughput_change FROM ai_impact_metrics ORDER BY calculated_at DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT review_time_change FROM ai_impact_metrics ORDER BY calculated_at DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT lead_time_change FROM ai_impact_metrics ORDER BY calculated_at DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT CASE WHEN explicit_tool_detected = true THEN 'Explicit (Confirmed)' WHEN ai_confidence_score >= 70 THEN 'High (≥70%)' WHEN ai_confidence_score >= 40 THEN 'Medium (40-69%)' ELSE 'Low (<40%)' END as confidence_level, COUNT(*) as count FROM ai_usage_signals GROUP BY confidence_level ORDER BY count DESC

SELECT DATE(detected_at) as date, AVG(ai_confidence_score) as avg_score, SUM(CASE WHEN explicit_tool_detected = true THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as explicit_count FROM ai_usage_signals GROUP BY DATE(detected_at) ORDER BY date
